name: the review queue routes a high-confidence rule that has coverage gaps to coverage-review
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-gap --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var. The code should read nicely.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review-queue.sh" --in d.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'rule=g-gap confidence=high gaps=1 queue=coverage-review' e.txt && echo coverage-review 1>&2
